heading: Stephen Foster Memorial Day
label: 140 Stephen Foster Memorial Day
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14036:158., .Oct. 27, 1951, ch. 59365 Stat. 659
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14036:158., .Oct. 27, 1951, ch. 59365 Stat. 659

children.text: designating January 13 as Stephen Foster Memorial Day; and
calling on the people of the United States to observe Stephen Foster Memorial Day with appropriate ceremonies, pilgrimages to his shrines, and musical programs featuring his compositions.
